html:
Exclusive to:

“Grows trees up one stage. Can also restore 8 Growth Formula, 32 Compost and 8 Manure to Farm Soil.

Used on Wormwood will heal 2 Health and 1 Health a second for 32 seconds.”

-

Tree Jam is an item exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in the Waterlogged beta.

It is crafted using two Figs and a Glommer's Goop. It can be used to enrich Knobbly Trees to eventually turn them into Above-Average Tree Trunks, and can also be used on any Tree to instantly grow it by one stage. It can also serve as Fertilizer, restoring 8 Growth Formula, 32 Compost, and 8 Manure to farm soil. Wormwood can fertilize himself with it to heal 2 + 32 (over 32 sec) health, and trigger his blooming. Additionally, it can seal the leak on a Boat without leaving any patch, doing so will also repair 20 for Boat.

Tips

  • Tree Jam is the only way to completely remove leaks on a boat, as Wavey Jones will attempt to remove Boat Patches and Trusty Tapes at 25% Sanity.
  • Knobbly Trees not fully grown after sprouting from a Knobbly Seed will advance their growth as well, rather than be enriched. To avoid the potential waste of a Tree Jam, make sure that the Knobbly Tree is at its final stage before attempting to enrich it.

Gallery

  • Tree Jam Dropped Sack
  • Used
  • Tree Jam concept art from Rhymes With Play #282.[1]
  • Tree Jam concept art from Rhymes With Play #282.

References

  1. ↑ Rhymes With Play #282

"treegrowthsolution"
“Mmmm, tree food!”
–Wilson
“Eww tree gunk!”
–Willow
“Grow, tree! Be strong!”
–Wolfgang
“I suppose even trees get hungry.”
–Wendy
“IT INCREASES ORGANIC GROWTH. IT MUST BE DESTROYED”
–WX-78
“This fig mixture appears to induce rapid arboreal growth.”
–Wickerbottom
“The bigger the tree, the better to chop down!”
–Woodie
“Looks like you're in a bit of a jam, pal.”
–Maxwell
“An öffering tö the trees, may they carry it ön tö great Yggdrasil itself.”
–Wigfrid
“If only we had some peanut butter.”
–Webber
“A growing tree should eat well!”
–Warly
“Tree friends like it!”
–Wormwood
“Alright trees, come get your grub!”
–Winona
“It'll really rib to your sticks.”
–Wortox
“Glurph. Put all over face and didn't grow any bigger!”
–Wurt
“I'm glad we found a use for those figs other than eating them...”
–Walter
“I can finally speed up those dreadfully slow trees!”
–Wanda
“Grows trees up one stage. Can also restore 8 Growth Formula, 32 Compost and 8 Manure to Farm Soil.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Tree Jam là một vật phẩm độc quyền cho Don't Starve Together và được giới thiệu trong bản beta Waterlogged.
